title: Guardian Pharmacy International Enterprises is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Guardian Pharmacy International Enterprises is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Guardian Pharmacy International Enterprises in Bhubaneswar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Guardian Pharmacy International Enterprises:
Guardian Pharmacy International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Guardian Pharmacy International Enterprises!
